rationale: Factual wire report on Coty-Kering license exit with no evaluative verdict on Gucci.
Descriptive T1 reporting of license handover terms and rationale, no independent verdict on Gucci brand health.
Purely descriptive campaign write-up (what/who/where) with no outlet evaluative verdict; activation coverage discount applies.
Critical-angle T1 coverage of CEO memo citing Gucci as revenue drag and driving APAC store closures, quantified negative momentum.
Attendee social coverage of brand-staged launch event; fandom/activation trap caps magnitude, engagement is genuine but not independent critical judgment.
Activation recap with outlet's own positive verdict on turnout/collection; capped at 0.5 per activation-coverage rule.
Organic community thread citing stitching/hardware/material QC complaints, mixed with some defenders; mild given verification gaps.
Organic TikTok discourse cluster calling Gucci tacky/overrated vs quieter-luxury peers, construction complaints post-price-hikes.
Independent trade-press analysis with data-backed critical judgment on sustained sales collapse and brand dilution affecting APAC demand.
Grassroots resale marketplace guide stating conservative retention range factually, no strong positive or negative verdict.
